raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Since the passage of the Affordable Care Act in 2010, California has increased the rate of residents with health insurance.",
    "As a result of actions taken since the Affordable Care Act, close to 94% of Californians had access to health insurance even before the most recent expansions.",
    "Health insurance coverage, and Medi-Cal expansion specifically, have played a key role in reducing poverty in California.",
    "In the absence of Medi-Cal, poverty among young children could increase exponentially.",
    "Medicaid expansion has improved the financial performance of hospitals and other providers.",
    "Numerous hospitals in California have been on the verge of closure in recent years due to fiscal insolvency.",
    "Coverage expansions through Medicaid have helped reduce avoidable visits to emergency departments."
  ]
}
```
